text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I walk through the hall, I see Haru Urara
heading my way, looking stressed...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
My head is pounding... It feels like when I eat too
much ice cream...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ngh... I think I'm seeing stars...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like Haru Urara is suffering from a
headache.
